narrative_arc: cursed dark-haired woman drinks potion mid-confrontation → transforms into purple muscle-hero → brawls a Supergirl-type → cut to a second woman who transforms at home (white/gold) and powers up a male bystander → the two muscle-women clash in a canyon → white/gold force-feeds the protagonist another potion → escalating tit-for-tat potion-fueled growth (clothing/armor bursting, towering scale) → ends mid-escalation with the genie-lamp potion source and a smug blonde (to be continued)

panels.notes: Dark-haired protagonist tilts head back and chugs the purple potion (the trigger). Raked diagonal of the arm/bottle; small whispered glug SFX.
Blonde antagonist reacts open-mouthed in alarm/rage. Strong face but flat-level head-on framing with empty speech balloon.
The emptied bottle shatters mid-air, shards thrown toward camera over an impact starburst. Big yellow CRASSSHH title-SFX dominates the panel; no figure.
Protagonist rises into frame, glowing purple eyes, smug grin, fist to mouth — the curse takes hold. Low-hero angle sells the menace.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=1; opening page IS the trigger — no preamble, drinks-potion to glowing-eyes in four panels. Strong faces; SFX-forward.

panels.notes: Side view, arms/back swelling with purple energy crackling off the skin; motion lines. KZZZT electrical SFX drives the growth.
ECU-adjacent on the face: glowing eyes, bared grin, neck cords — peak strain/ecstasy. Best face on the page.
ECU money-shot of swelling glutes/thigh with energy aura; no face. Pure body-part growth panel.
Thigh/leg detail filling frame as muscle inflates; energy crackle. Multi-panel-progressive body coverage.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; dense ECU/CU body-part growth grid — exactly the zoom coverage the niche wants. KZZZT repeated as a growth pulse.

panels.notes: Full-body splash: completed purple muscle-hero airborne, double-biceps-ish pose, sash torn, against green radial burst. The money full-body reveal of transformation #1.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; single splash full-body-reveal. Caps the first growth scene; dynamic low-hero flight pose.

panels.notes: Purple-suit and blonde collide fist-to-fist on a raked diagonal; WHAM impact star. Strong action diagonal.
Blonde lands a gloved punch to the protagonist's face; CRACK. Diagonal exchange continues.
Protagonist knocked tumbling, canted/dutch frame; WHUMP. Good kinetic tilt.
Wide city skyline; tiny figure slammed into a building, dust plume. Strong depth + scale-contrast establishing the fight's stakes.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; fight page with consistent action diagonals, a dutch tilt, and a wide depth establisher. SFX-heavy.

panels.notes: High angle down into a crater of rubble where the blonde lies small; red car and wreckage in FG. Vulnerability + depth.
Blonde heaves a girder, arms thrust toward camera, gritted-teeth rage. Good foreshortening.
Both heroines in a wrecked cityscape, blonde from behind hurling debris; small distant purple figure (scale-contrast).
Blonde charges, arms forward; determined snarl.
Blonde takes flight toward the protagonist, FWOOSH. Dynamic launch.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; aftermath-of-impact then re-engage. Lots of low-hero + foreshortening; no flat panels.

panels.notes: Purple-suit catches/flings a hurled truck one-handed, smug; the truck looms in FG (scale-contrast). Power beat.
Tight on the protagonist's grinning face streaking through a purple speed-band; strong canted motion strip.
The two clash again on a strong diagonal, dust and impact; big TAGUUUUM SFX. Energetic collision staging.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; high-energy power+clash page. Speed-band CU is a nice steal. SFX carry the kinetics.

panels.notes: Scene change: second blonde waking in bed, looking up; soft high angle. Calm domestic reset after the brawl.
She sits up in a tank top, smiling, sheet across lap. Flat-level domestic shot.
Stands by the mirror stretching, hand to chest. Flat-level full-ish figure; mild expression.
Sits at a pink laptop, smiling, typing. Flat-level; small keyboard SFX.
Continues at laptop. Quietest panel; pure setup.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=4; the comic's flat hotspot — a whole domestic page of near-static eye-level mid-shots. Necessary tonal reset but visually the weakest page.

panels.notes: Blonde glances toward the door, hand to chest; a KNOCK. Setup beat, flat framing.
Male friend (red shirt) at the doorway, OTS into the dark hall. Some depth.
Pink magic flares around the blonde as the curse activates (SHIIING) — the trigger for transformation #2. Man recoils.
Head thrown back, open-mouthed gasp as the change begins; chest swelling into frame. Peak-intensity face.
ECU on the chest/torso starting to expand against a dark void; growth-focus money panel opening scene #2.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=1; the bridge from domestic setup into transformation #2 — escalates distance from flat MCU to ECU as the curse hits.

panels.notes: Double-biceps flex mid-growth, arms ballooning, ecstatic grin, pink radial burst. KZZZT growth pulse. Big peak face + flex.
Torso/abs detail crunching into definition; energy crackle, no face. Progressive body coverage.
ECU swelling glutes/hip filling frame. Money body-part panel.
Thigh detail inflating. Same progressive-ECU grid as page 2 — consistent device across both transformations.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; transformation #2's dense ECU grid mirrors page 2 — heavy zoom coverage, repeated KZZZT/POLM growth SFX.

panels.notes: Full-body splash: completed white/gold muscle-heroine, double-biceps pose, in the bedroom doorway (depth). The full-body reveal capping transformation #2.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; second full-body-reveal splash; doorway gives real depth. Pairs with page 3 as the matched reveal pages.

panels.notes: Towering white/gold heroine (FG) raises a finger while the small kneeling man (BG) looks on — clear scale-contrast. She begins working her curse on him.
Pink magic engulfs the kneeling man; she gestures. Size disparity emphasized.
She flexes a forearm/biceps that visibly bulks further (gold band straining), grinning; small magic sigil in BG. Growth-focus on her own arm.
ECU on her grinning mouth/jaw and raised hand. Confident close-out.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=4; flat_panel_count=0; best scale-contrast page in the book — towering heroine vs tiny man, strong FG/BG depth. Wide distance spread MLS→ECU.

panels.notes: Canyon location; purple-suit protagonist (FG) faces off, hands on hips, against rock spires. Establishes the new battlefield.
White/gold heroine posed confidently across the gap. Two-shot setup of the clash.
Purple-suit lunges across a hard diagonal swinging; WHUMP. Kinetic charge.
Reaction CU — white/gold's wide-eyed shock as the blow lands. Good reaction-intercut.
Protagonist knocked back/tumbling on a canted frame while white/gold stands ground; CRAK. Strong dutch + scale staging.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; the heroine-vs-heroine clash kicks off; reaction-intercut + diagonals + a dutch. Clean action staging.

panels.notes: Wide canyon: white/gold small on a far ridge, energy blast across the gorge; KRAKOOOM. Establishing scale of the fight.
Protagonist downed in the rocks (FG) under the towering white/gold torso (BG). Size disparity reasserted.
White/gold gloating, finger raised. Fairly flat eye-level close.
White/gold produces another purple potion, smiling — sets up the force-feed. Repeats the prior framing (mild flatness).

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=2; result of the clash plus the new-potion reveal; two near-identical gloat MCUs are the only soft spot. KRAKOOOM establishes scale well.

panels.notes: Protagonist looks up apprehensively, dwarfed by the white/gold bust in frame. Dread building.
Tight on the protagonist's grimace as a hand grips her jaw. Real fear/strain on the face.
White/gold tips the potion into the held-open mouth of the protagonist — the forced trigger. Tense, well-staged.
Potion dribbles down the protagonist's chin as it takes hold; wide-eyed. Trigger for transformation #3 (forced).

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=2; flat_panel_count=0; the force-feeding beat — fear/panic faces carry the dread. A genuine tease-then-trigger structure (she resists, it's forced).

panels.notes: Forearm/gloved fist swelling with pink energy. Growth pulse re-ignites on the protagonist.
ECU up the torso as abs/obliques carve in. Pure body-part money panel.
Thigh detail inflating, energy crackle. Progressive coverage continues.
Hero-shot from below: arms spread, chest surging, ecstatic open-mouthed laugh, pink burst. Peak strain/ecstasy face anchors the page.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; transformation #3 — same proven ECU-progressive grid; bottom hero panel adds a 5/5 ecstasy face. Strong growth page.

panels.notes: Full-body splash: protagonist now in matching white/gold armor, far larger, grinning, against magenta burst. Third full-body reveal — the forced upgrade pays off.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; third full-body-reveal splash; low-hero flight pose. Pattern: every transformation ends on a splash (p3/p10/p16).

panels.notes: The white fabric over the chest tears/strains as growth continues; ecstatic face. Clothing-destruction beat.
Torso/abs blasting outward against a green burst, garment shredding. Money torso panel.
ECU of a hand snapping fingers, gold band on the wrist. Beat of control/command.
A fresh pink potion materializes in a giant hand. Sets up the next escalation.
Protagonist arms-up, fully grown chest/torso, smiling. Aftermath flex of the upgrade.
High angle: the blonde (now smaller) drinks the new potion to keep pace; sweat drop. The arms-race continues.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=4; flat_panel_count=0; six-panel escalation page — clothing-destruction + a new-potion handoff that re-arms the rivalry. Widest distance spread in the book.

panels.notes: Tight on the blonde's glowing eyes/brow as her own growth surges. Intense partial-face.
Gold armor band on the shoulder/arm cracks and pops off as muscle outgrows it. Clothing/armor-destruction money beat.
ECU of the chest ballooning further, energy crackle. Pure growth-focus.
ECU glutes/hip expanding. Progressive body coverage on the blonde's surge.
Blonde with purple-streaked hair, open-mouthed strain, body huge and aura blazing. Caps the surge with a strong face.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; blonde's counter-growth with explicit armor-destruction (panel 2) — the clearest clothing-burst device in the book. KZZZT/POLM throughout.

panels.notes: Establishing-scale splash: colossal blonde towering over the canyon, single-biceps flex, with the tiny kneeling man at her feet for scale (lower right). The biggest size-comparison beat in the book.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=0; the size-comparison splash — colossal figure vs human-scale man sells the magnitude better than any panel. Fourth full-body reveal.

panels.notes: Colossal blonde looks down, grinning; tiny dark-haired figure in FG (scale-contrast). Gloat beat.
Blonde laughing/taunting in profile. Character beat.
Small protagonist (FG silhouette) faces the towering blonde reaching down. Size disparity held.
Protagonist surges back with her own growth, arms up, abs/torso defined, pink aura. Counter-escalation.
Protagonist re-armored in white/gold, chest/abs huge, confident grin, aura blazing. Re-matches the blonde's tier.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=3; flat_panel_count=0; the tit-for-tat continues — blonde gloats, protagonist re-escalates. Persistent scale-contrast and low-hero angles.

panels.notes: Blonde (now even larger) flexes; torso fills frame, energy dripping. Continued peak growth.
Towering pink-aura thigh/hip with a golden genie-lamp vessel at base (FG) — the curse's source object foregrounded. Scale + the lamp motif.
Small dark-haired figure clutches the lamp/potion amid her own pink growth-cloud. The lamp changes hands.
The golden lamp sits amid swirling pink energy clouds — a quiet 'object' beat before the final reveal.
Final story panel: the blonde grins triumphantly, fingers raised, against a green burst — a smug button, no resolution. The cliffhanger note.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=4; flat_panel_count=0; final story page — surfaces the genie-lamp source and ends on a smug blonde mid-arms-race. No real climax/resolution; pull-forward is weak (just 'still escalating').

panels.notes: Credits page over a faint gold-armor backdrop. Art by Boogie; Written by Gribble; Produced by GrowGetterComics.com; Colors by Little L. and Zere; special thanks + Patreon supporter list. No story content.

pages.page_notes: distance_spread=1; flat_panel_count=1; pure credits/back-matter — not a story page. Lists creators and Patreon supporters; no popularity metrics.

strengths: Growth is the spine, not a one-and-done: FOUR distinct transformation surges (p1-3, p8-11, p15-17, p18-21), each using the same proven dense ECU/CU body-part grid (p2, p9, p15, p18) so every limb gets a zoomed money-shot — exactly the multi-panel-progressive zoom coverage the niche prizes.

Every transformation lands on a full-body splash reveal (p3, p10, p16, p19), and p19's EWS pairs the colossal figure with the tiny kneeling man for the book's best size-comparison — scale sold by composition, not just bigger muscles.

SFX do real work: KZZZT/POLM pulse through every growth page as a 'sensation' beat with no dialogue needed, and the battle's WHAM/CRACK/WHUMP/KRAGSH/TAGUUUUM/KRAKOOOM carry the kinetics (p4, p6, p13).

Action pages avoid flat defaults: p4-6 and p12 stage collisions on hard diagonals with foreshortened fists, dutch tilts (p4.3, p12.5) and reaction-intercut CUs (p12.4); p11 nails FG/BG scale-contrast (towering heroine vs tiny man).
Faces mostly carry the beat — repeated 5/5 ecstasy/strain on growth peaks (p2.2, p8.4, p9.1, p15.4, p17.1) and genuine fear/panic on the force-feed (p14.2-4).
weaknesses: Story is thin and ends without a climax: it's a potion-fueled tit-for-tat that just keeps escalating, then stops on a smug blonde (p21.5) with the genie-lamp as the only hook — no resolution, no real cliffhanger payoff, weak pull-forward.
P7 is the flat hotspot: an entire domestic page of four near-static eye-level mid-shots (p7.2-7.5) with empty/low-energy faces — the only page that reads as default-flat.

Two characters are hard to track: the opening jumps in with zero setup (p1) and a second protagonist appears cold at home (p7); without the prior issue, who's cursing whom and why is muddy, and both heroines wear matching white/gold by mid-book, hurting clarity.
Many empty speech balloons are drawn but unlettered across the set (p1.2, p3, p5.1, p7, p10, p13, p20-21) — dialogue beats are staged but the words are missing, so character/plot can't land.
Repetition creeps in: p13.3-13.4 are near-identical gloat MCUs, and the growth-ECU grids, while effective, recycle the same four body-part framings each surge with little variation.
